Article I: General Provisions
Section 1.1: Scope
This Agreement governs the relationship between the parties regarding the services.
The services shall be performed in accordance with the specifications.
No amendment to this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by both parties.
The failure of either party to enforce any provision of this Agreement shall not be construed as a waiver.
All notices under this Agreement shall be in writing.
This Agreement represents the entire understanding.
